requirement.description: Upon a change in door warning status, the gateway shall immediately transmit the updated warning information to the instrument cluster.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

GW_WARNINGS_ID = 0xD2

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'socketcan'),
        channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 'can0'),
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def get_door_warning(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
    return (data_bytes[0] >> 1) & 0x01

def collect_gw_messages(bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.1)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == GW_WARNINGS_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission when DoorWarning transitions 0 → 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h; All doors closed; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
steps: Open any door while vehicle is moving
test_cases.expected_result: DoorWarning transitions from 0 to 1 and updated frame transmitted immediately
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_imm_001_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    states = [get_door_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission when DoorWarning transitions 1 → 0 due to door closure
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h; Door open; Monitor CAN ID 0xD2
test_cases.expected_result: DoorWarning transitions from 1 to 0 and updated frame transmitted immediately
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_imm_002_clear_on_close(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    states = [get_door_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 1 in states and 0 in states
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission when DoorWarning clears due to vehicle stop
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Door open; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h
test_cases.expected_result: DoorWarning transitions from 1 to 0 immediately after speed becomes 0
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_imm_003_clear_on_stop(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    states = [get_door_warning(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission on rapid door open while moving
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h; Doors closed

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transmission on rapid door close while moving
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h; Door open

test_cases.title: Verify no redundant transmission when DoorWarning state does not change
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; VehicleSpeed > 0 km/h; Door open
test_cases.expected_result: DoorWarning remains constant with no additional transition events
